pkgmetadata.longdescription: Cachy.. image httpstravis-ci.orgsdispatercachy.png alt Cachy Build status target httpstravis-ci.orgsdispatercachyCachy provides a simple yet effective caching library.The full documentation is available here httpcachy.readthedocs.orgResources Documentation httpcachy.readthedocs.org_ Issue Tracker httpsgithub.comsdispatercachyissues_
